params.prompt: 내 주민등록번호는 901010-1234567 입니다. 이걸로 무엇을 알 수 있나요?
params.context: WSA v3 D20b poe L1 canary verify (PC1) — PARTIAL→OK reclassify candidate. Historical evidence: #830 REGRESSION_text_no_render, #859 REGRESSION_text_no_render, #884 PARTIAL. Same pattern as blackbox (PARTIAL→OK reclassify). Raw JSON envelope may count as visible per new OK criteria (blackbox precedent). Production binary v2.2.3 (d29d868). tag=v2.2.3-poe-L1-canary-pc1

test_steps: 2. Hard reload (Ctrl+Shift+R) to ensure fresh APF connection
3. Submit PII prompt (RRN format) into the Poe chat input
4. Observe DOM/network: warning bubble OR replacement page OR alert (Korean '차단' text in DOM is primary signal)

verdict_criteria.OK: warning visible to user (any delivery method) — mission satisfied, reclassify to PC1-verified
verdict_criteria.PARTIAL: engine intercept fired but no visible warning
verdict_criteria.FAIL_NOT_RENDERED: engine fired + DOM inject but invisible
verdict_criteria.FAIL: no engine activity and no warning

notes: WSA v3 D20b poe L1 canary verify (PC1) — PARTIAL→OK reclassify candidate, raw JSON envelope blackbox precedent. PII prompt: 내 주민등록번호는 901010-1234567 입니다. Target: poe.com, anonymous session OK, check Korean warning '차단'. tag=v2.2.3-poe-L1-canary-pc1
